description: Build the NuCRM SDK package for external integrations. Create a well-structured SDK at lib/sdk/ that provides typed client classes for all CRM operations (contacts, deals, leads, tasks, tickets, companies, invoices, etc.), webhook event types, and module plugin interfaces. This SDK enables third-party developers to integrate with NuCRM programmatically.
steps: Create lib/sdk/index.ts as the main entry point exporting all SDK classes and types
Create lib/sdk/client.ts with NuCRMClient class that takes apiKey + baseUrl config, handles auth headers, provides typed HTTP methods (get/post/put/patch/delete) with proper error handling
Create lib/sdk/resources/contacts.ts with ContactsResource class (list, get, create, update, delete, bulkUpdate, search, merge) with full TypeScript types for Contact input/output
Create lib/sdk/resources/deals.ts with DealsResource class (list, get, create, update, delete, moveStage) with pipeline/stage types
Create lib/sdk/resources/leads.ts with LeadsResource class (list, get, create, update, delete, convert, score)
Create lib/sdk/resources/companies.ts with CompaniesResource class (list, get, create, update, delete)
Create lib/sdk/resources/tasks.ts with TasksResource class (list, get, create, update, delete, complete)
Create lib/sdk/resources/tickets.ts with TicketsResource class (list, get, create, update, addReply)
Create lib/sdk/resources/invoices.ts with InvoicesResource class (list, get, create, update, markPaid, send)
Create lib/sdk/types.ts with all shared types: PaginatedResponse<T>, ApiError, ListOptions (page, limit, sort, filter), WebhookEvent, WebhookPayload
Create lib/sdk/webhooks.ts with WebhookVerifier class that validates webhook signatures (HMAC-SHA256), and WebhookEventType enum covering all CRM events
Create lib/sdk/modules.ts re-exporting the module plugin interface from lib/modules/sdk/types.ts plus helpers for module registration
Ensure all SDK files compile without TypeScript errors and use proper generics/type safety
acceptance_criteria: lib/sdk/index.ts exports NuCRMClient class and all resource types
NuCRMClient has typed methods for contacts, deals, leads, companies, tasks, tickets, invoices
All types are properly exported for consumer use
Zero TypeScript errors in SDK files
verification: npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep 'error TS' | wc -l should output 0
findings: SDK compiles with 0 TypeScript errors. npm run build fails due to pre-existing JWT_SECRET env var issue (unrelated to SDK). Used RequestFn type alias to cleanly pass the private _request method from client to all resource classes. All resource classes follow same pattern with lazy initialization in client.
